title: yosys gets segmentation fault on large logic expressions
body:
command : 
yosys -p read_verilog "g_mux__descaxi4stream_desc_agent_num4096.v"

the file attached in the zip file.

 Yosys 0.7+285 (git sha1 d3b3dd8, gcc 4.7.2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -fPIC)

-- Parsing `/usr/veri4/user/ord/verilog_for_debug/verilog/g_mux__descaxi4stream_desc_agent_num4096.v' using frontend `verilog' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing Verilog input from `/usr/veri4/user/ord/verilog_for_debug/verilog/g_mux__descaxi4stream_desc_agent_num4096.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\g_mux__descaxi4stream_desc_agent_num4096'.
Warning: Deep recursion in AST simplifier.
Does this design contain insanely long expressions?
Segmentation fault

[g_mux__descaxi4stream_desc_agent_num4096.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/1629350/g_mux__descaxi4stream_desc_agent_num4096.zip)

Thanks
